text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hearing that Super Creek is doing some solo
dance training, I decide to drop by and watch.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Phew... That dance session felt amazing!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
But I have to say... Hehe. I liked the way you were
looking at me...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Your eyes were sparkling like a child's.
choice_data_list:
I couldn't help myself with how much fun you
seemed to be having.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Goodness, are you getting the urge to dance too,
Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I'm glad to hear it! Let's dance together
next!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
It's okay. We still have some time before the next
person comes to practice. What do you say?
choice_data_list: I'd hate to interrupt your practice...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
It's okay. We still have some time before the next
person comes to practice. What do you say?
choice_data_list: I'd hate to interrupt your practice...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: It makes me happy to see you this excited!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe, I can't believe I get to dance with you,
Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Maybe I'll be the one with the sparkling eyes this time! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Super Creek beams as we take to the stage, and
the two of us enjoy our dance together.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
But I've been dancing all on my own this whole
time, and I'm feeling rather lonely...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Isn't there a kind trainer out there who could
possibly dance with me?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
...Ehehe. Thank goodness, there's one right
here! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Super Creek takes my hand, and we have fun
dancing together. She appears to learn something
from watching my movements.
